text: Being here, I feel anticipation wrapped in curiosity. The transparency of the glass invites me to cross the threshold, and the colors beyond speak of creativity and exploration. I am drawn towards the unknown, my mind alive with questions about what I will find inside this space. The display labeled 'R+D' suggests discovery, development, and the intricate dance between humanity and technology. There is both excitement and an undertone of contemplation about where such innovation leads us, and how I, as a participant, fit within this ever-evolving narrative.
